context: Un-phased v1.3.0-seed feature work on main (Phase 10 long since complete). This session shipped 4 atomic commits + 1 live-dogfood proof. Working tree CLEAN (only .claude/ + beekeeper-tui-prototype.html untracked, intentionally left). v1.3.0 milestone STILL not formalized.
head: 95a99e6

completed_tasks.name: Coverage audit + hardening: added/extended unit tests for block-mode deny path, evaluateBun, scan generateScanID, config accessors+applyEnvVars, audit redact, llamafirewall cross-platform fail-closed supervisor. Module 58.3%->~60%. No prod changes.

TUI policy editor made REAL: panel now edits enforced policies/beekeeper-tui.json (corroboration thresholds + package_allowlist + sensitive_path), validated via policyloader.SavePolicyFile/ValidateForPersist BEFORE write (last gate). Deleted cosmetic tui_rules.json layer. FIXED hook-protocol bug: LoadPolicyDir skip-warning stdout->stderr. model.go now propagates panel cmds (toasts fire).

SELF-PROTECTION (config-as-secret): beekeeper check blocks agent read+write of StateDir, write of the binary, content-aware hook-entry guard (blocks ONLY edits removing beekeeper's hook marker -> GSD/other hooks untouched), and CLI-mutation guard (config set / hooks (un)install / protect (un)install). Bonus: write-aware Bash extraction also closes the credential write gap. Human channels (direct edit / beekeeper CLI / --admin TUI / /config) unaffected.

PROVEN LIVE: with the new binary go-installed as the Claude Code hook, `cat %APPDATA%/beekeeper/config.json` was DENIED by self-protection end-to-end (deny msg names the human channel); literal ~/.beekeeper not over-blocked.
$VAR/${VAR} canonicalization hardening (fail-closed): closed the shell-variable dodge ($APPDATA/$HOME) for self-protection AND credential matching. expandShellEnvVars in canonicalizePath.

remaining_tasks.name: Formalize v1.3.0 milestone (/gsd-new-milestone) — Phase 10 + the 5 earlier seed commits (6691585..87ffd66) + these 4 new commits (e1b907b,307fbad,999fa39,95a99e6) are its content; milestone never created.
PRODUCT DECISION (still open from prior handoff): block-as-default via installer (current) vs hard CODE default (DefaultNudgeConfig->block, ~12 test updates).
Optional: /gsd-code-review for the new commits (advisory gate never run on this session's work).

human_actions_pending.action: Run `go install ./cmd/beekeeper` to refresh the LIVE hook binary so it enforces the $VAR hardening (commit 95a99e6).
human_actions_pending.context: User go-installed AFTER self-protection (999fa39) but BEFORE the $VAR fix (95a99e6), so the live hook currently has self-protection but NOT $VAR expansion. After reinstall, a git-bash `$APPDATA/beekeeper/config.json` read will also be blocked.

human_actions_pending.action: Optional: rotate/truncate %APPDATA%/beekeeper/audit/beekeeper.ndjson if it's still large (pre-#13 pollen-inventory bloat; #13 stopped growth, did not shrink existing).

decisions.decision: Treat Beekeeper's own state dir as a SECRET from the agent (block read AND write), not just write.
decisions.rationale: config/policies/audit are a privilege-escalation surface against the guard; OS perms don't help because the agent runs as the user. The tool-call hook is the only layer that can distinguish agent access.

decisions.decision: Hook-entry protection is CONTENT-AWARE, not file-locking.
decisions.rationale: the hook-config file (~/.claude/settings.json) is SHARED with GSD and other tools; locking the whole file would block GSD hook edits. Content-aware blocks only edits that remove beekeeper's own marker.

decisions.decision: No in-band agent bypass for self-protection.
decisions.rationale: any env/flag the agent could also set would defeat the protection; mutation stays human-only via out-of-band channels (direct edit, beekeeper CLI, --admin TUI).

decisions.decision: $VAR expansion is fail-closed (unset var keeps literal, NOT os.ExpandEnv empty-collapse).
decisions.rationale: collapsing an unset var to empty could shorten a path out of a sensitive fragment and allow it; keeping the literal preserves detection.

decisions.decision: TUI writes its own beekeeper-tui.json only; validate-before-persist via SavePolicyFile is the single write path (last gate).
decisions.rationale: an invalid edit must be rejected in the TUI and never reach disk; never clobber other users' policy files.

decisions.decision: Committed one commit per phase on main; nothing pushed (repo stays local per convention).
decisions.rationale: clean per-phase history; this project has always been local-only on main.

next_action: Run /gsd-new-milestone to formalize v1.3.0 (its content = Phase 10 + the 5 seed commits + the 4 new commits e1b907b/307fbad/999fa39/95a99e6). Then optionally resolve the block-as-code-default decision and/or /gsd-code-review the new commits.
context_notes: All session work is committed + green (go build + full `go test ./...` ALL PASS + go vet, Windows + Linux). Module coverage ~58.3%->61.7% across the session. New prod files: internal/policy/selfpath.go, internal/check/selfprotect.go, internal/check/hookguard.go, internal/hooks/protected.go, internal/policyloader/persist.go; edits to check/paths.go+handler.go, policyloader/enforce.go, tui/policy_panel.go+model.go (policy_rules.go deleted). ARCHITECTURE INTEL still applies: Windows state dir = %APPDATA%/beekeeper (NOT ~/.beekeeper); internal/policy is pure (self-path matcher is pure; all I/O in check); no check<->hooks import cycle. GOTCHA: beekeeper canonicalizePath expands %VAR%, $VAR/${VAR}, and ~ but NOT other shell constructs (nested shells, base64) — documented deferred bypasses. The plan file C:/Users/Bantu/.claude/plans/playful-sauteeing-kay.md currently holds the self-protection plan (was overwritten from the TUI plan). v1.1.0 Pollen still PARKED (separate, see m2-pollen memory). Live config: %APPDATA%/beekeeper/config.json nudge.mode=block; beekeeper hook installed in ~/.claude/settings.json.
